rule_metadata.author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
rule_metadata.title: Allow Service Access Using Security Descriptor Tampering Via Sc.EXE

rules.rule_text:
title: Allow Service Access Using Security Descriptor Tampering Via Sc.EXE
id: 6c8fbee5-dee8-49bc-851d-c3142d02aa47
related:
- id: a537cfc3-4297-4789-92b5-345bfd845ad0
  type: similar
status: test
description: Detects suspicious DACL modifications to allow access to a service from
  a suspicious trustee. This can be used to override access restrictions set by previous
  ACLs.
references:
- https://twitter.com/0gtweet/status/1628720819537936386
- https://itconnect.uw.edu/tools-services-support/it-systems-infrastructure/msinf/other-help/understanding-sddl-syntax/
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/win32/secauthz/sid-strings
author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
date: 2023-02-28
modified: 2025-10-22
tags:
- attack.privilege-escalation
- attack.persistence
- attack.t1543.003
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_sc:
  - Image|endswith: \sc.exe
  - OriginalFileName: sc.exe
  selection_sdset:
    CommandLine|contains|all:
    - sdset
    - A;
  selection_trustee:
    CommandLine|contains:
    - ;IU
    - ;SU
    - ;BA
    - ;SY
    - ;WD
  filter_optional_hexnode:
    ParentImage: C:\Hexnode\Hexnode Agent\Current\HexnodeAgent.exe
  condition: all of selection_* and not 1 of filter_optional_*
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
